faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.tagline: Find answers to common questions about orders, shipping, returns, and more.
faq.noResults: No questions found matching your search.

questions.question: How do I track my order?
questions.answer: Once your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking number via email. You can use this number to track your delivery on our website or the courier's tracking page. You can also check order status in your account under "My Orders".

questions.question: Can I modify or cancel my order?
questions.answer: Orders can be modified or cancelled within 24 hours of placing them, provided they haven't been shipped yet. Please contact our customer support immediately if you need to make changes. Once an order is in production or shipped, modifications are not possible.

questions.question: How long does it take to process an order?
questions.answer: Standard orders are processed within 2-3 business days. Custom-made furniture pieces may take 4-6 weeks depending on complexity. You'll receive order confirmation and updates via email throughout the process.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.tagline: We take great care in delivering your furniture safely to your doorstep.

whiteGlove.title: White Glove Delivery
whiteGlove.description: Our team delivers to your room of choice, unpacks, and assembles your furniture.

insured.title: Fully Insured
insured.description: All shipments are fully insured against damage during transit.

scheduling.title: Flexible Scheduling
scheduling.description: Choose a delivery date and time slot that works best for you.

packaging.title: Careful Packaging
packaging.description: Each piece is carefully wrapped with protective materials for safe transit.
